subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. As I have not ample time I give a brief answer. Concerning the Baha'I partner I hope that success may be realized
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید لکن فرصت جواب نیست لهذا مختصر مرقوم میگردد در
